dataset.description: The Telco customer churn dataset contains information about a fictional telco company that provided home phone and Internet services to 7043 customers in California in Q3. It indicates which customers have left, stayed, or signed up for their service. Multiple important demographics are included for each customer, as well as a Satisfaction Score, Churn Score, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) index. It is designed to facilitate analysis of customer behavior and retention strategies.

columns.description: Unique identifier for a customer.
columns.name: customer_id

columns.description: A score (1 to 5) reflecting the customer's satisfaction level with the service.

desc: The Telco customer churn dataset contains information about a fictional telco company that provided home phone and Internet services to 7043 customers in California in Q3. It indicates which customers have left, stayed, or signed up for their service. Multiple important demographics are included for each customer, as well as a Satisfaction Score, Churn Score, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) index. It is designed to facilitate analysis of customer behavior and retention strategies.
goal: Use customer demographics, satisfaction score, churn score, and CLTV to predict which customers are likely to churn in the coming months, helping the company implement retention strategies.
name: Visual Analytics System telco_goal2_1742899501

effect.description: This interaction highlights specific risk categories based on brushing, filtering points into subsequent views.

visualization.description: Scatter plot with churn score on the X-axis, satisfaction score on the Y-axis, CLTV encoded as point size, and customer status encoded as color.

effect.description: Drilling down into specific demographics for further analysis in detail views.

visualization.description: Box plot showing churn score distributions across gender categories.

views.components: Enable dropdown menus to refine clusters.

visualization.description: Parallel coordinates chart to show cluster patterns across customer attributes.
Heatmap summarizing churn risk factors into categorical risk groups using color shading.

data.reason: Currently, there is no specific churn score in the data, so this requirement will be addressed in a future step.
data.requirement: Aggregate churn-related metrics (churn_value, churn_label, churn_category) to identify trends across customer demographics and satisfaction levels.

interaction.requirement: Modify toggles or sliders to dynamically adjust variables encoding (e.g., changing color mappings or axis variables).

visualization.requirement: Develop a box plot to represent the distribution of churn_value across different demographic groups.
Add a line chart to visualize trends over time, such as customer tenure versus average churn_value.
Stacked area charts will be removed as they are not necessary for the planned tasks.

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Overview_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis
sqls.name: Overview_View

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.gender, Customer_Info.senior_citizen, Customer_Info.under_30, Customer_Info.partner, Customer_Info.dependents, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id
sqls.name: Exploration_View

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Detail_View AS SELECT Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.gender, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id
sqls.name: Detail_View

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Insight_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_status, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Status_Analysis
sqls.name: Insight_View

tasks.method: Scatter plot with churn score on the X-axis, satisfaction score on the Y-axis, CLTV encoded as point size, and risk categories encoded as color. Enable brushing and linking to highlight specific risk categories.
tasks.objective: Identify relationships among churn score, satisfaction score, and CLTV to understand risk categories visually and explore patterns in churn likelihood.

tasks.method: Box plot to display the distribution of churn scores across different demographic groups.
tasks.objective: Identify how churn score distributions vary across demographic groups and detect any outliers or patterns.

tasks.method: K-means clustering with a parallel coordinates chart to visualize cluster patterns and distinguish customer segments based on attributes.
tasks.objective: Group customers into similar clusters for understanding churn risk and suggesting personalized retention strategies.

tasks.method: Create a new categorical feature combining churn score, satisfaction score, and CLTV into risk levels ('High', 'Medium', 'Low'). Use color shading in heatmaps to show aggregated trends.
tasks.objective: Simplify analysis by summarizing churn risk factors into actionable risk-level categories.

tasks.method: Line chart showing average churn score against customer tenure. Enable range selection for zooming into specific tenure intervals.
tasks.objective: Understand how churn score trends evolve with tenure to identify time-based retention risks.

tasks.method: Interactive filtering with dropdown menus to dynamically focus on high churn scores and low satisfaction scores while preserving demographic breakdowns.
tasks.objective: Target customers at highest risk of churning for focused analysis and intervention.

tasks.method: Drill-down interactions to view individual customer details by clicking on scatter plot points or bars in visualizations.
tasks.objective: Allow deep analysis of individual customers' metrics for personalized retention strategies.

tasks.method: Pie chart showing the proportion of customers within each churn category (e.g., Stayed, Churned, Joined).
tasks.objective: Provide an easily interpretable overview of customer churn distribution and category shares.

tasks.method: Bar charts to compare average CLTV and churn scores across different demographic categories.
tasks.objective: Identify how customer lifetime value and churn likelihood vary by demographic segments.

tasks.method: Scatter plot matrix to detect customers with anomalies in churn, satisfaction, and revenue metrics. Highlight outliers using visual cues.
tasks.objective: Spot customers who exhibit unusual behavior for deeper investigation.
